name: Minestrone Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 3 cups finely diced smoked ham (macaroni or smaller)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large stockpot and sauté onions, garlic, cilantro, and smoked ham until onions are soft.
2. Add boiling beef broth and simmer on medium-low heat for 20 minutes.
3. Add tomatoes, carrots, celery, corn, potatoes, and garbanzo beans all at once.
4. Cover and barely simmer until vegetables are tender.
5. Add pasta and cook until pasta is al dente.
6. Season with pepper.
7. Stir in freshly grated Parmesan cheese and serve hot.
